title: Better Square Fonts
description: This resource pack changes the vanilla minecraft fonts to much more square ones.
body:
# Better Square Fonts

**Better Square Fonts** is a resource pack that replaces Minecraft’s default vanilla font with a more square, clean, and visually pleasing style. The font is designed to feel cute yet readable, while still fitting naturally within the game’s UI.

This font pack is **accent-edited**, meaning accented characters such as **ā, ñ, é**, and similar glyphs have been carefully redesigned to match the square aesthetic, ensuring visual consistency across all supported languages.

---

## Installation Guide

1. Download the resource pack for your desired Minecraft version.  
2. Launch Minecraft and navigate to **Settings → Resource Packs → Open Pack Folder**.  
3. Drag the downloaded `.zip` file into the resource pack folder.  
4. Return to the game. If the pack does not appear immediately, press **F3 + T** to reload resources.  
5. Enable **Better Square Fonts** from the *Available* section.  
6. Click **Done** — and you’re ready to go! ☺️

![All the most used characters like A-Z,0-9,?#@,etc.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa5bed191a69a1e2334dbebee36a943f21a92ab9.jpeg)
